name: skillcrate
description: Local-first skill package format and registry exporter for reusable agent instruction bundles.

scripts.smoke: npm run build && node dist/src/cli.js inspect examples/fixtures/hello-skill && rm -rf .tmp-smoke && node dist/src/cli.js pack examples/fixtures/hello-skill .tmp-smoke/hello.skillcrate.json && node dist/src/cli.js unpack .tmp-smoke/hello.skillcrate.json .tmp-smoke/unpacked && node dist/src/cli.js index examples/fixtures .tmp-smoke/registry.json && node dist/src/cli.js check examples/fixtures/hello-skill --target claude-code
scripts.release:check: npm run check && npm test && npm run smoke && npm run package:smoke

author: Roger Chappell
